data.title: Caroline Ellison Walks Free 10 Months Early After FTX Testimony – What Happens Next?
data.description:
Caroline Ellison, former Alameda Research co-CEO and key witness in the FTX collapse, was released from federal custody after 440 days, after cooperating with U. S. prosecutors in the FTX fraud case.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/caroline-ellison-released-early-ftx-alameda/

data.title: Quantum Computing Raises Concerns Over Bitcoin Security
data.description: Key figures on Wall Street have expressed concerns about the potential impact of quantum computing on Bitcoin's security. According to NS3.AI, UBS CEO Sergio Ermotti and strategist Christopher Wood have highlighted the risk that quantum computers could pose by potentially breaking Bitcoin's cryptography. This development could endanger hundreds of billions of dollars in assets. While developers continue to debate solutions to this threat, institutional investors might begin to reduce their Bitcoin exposure due to these uncertainties.

data.title: Elon Musk and Ryanair CEO Clash Over Starlink Adoption
data.description: Elon Musk and Ryanair CEO Michael O’Leary are engaged in a public disagreement regarding the integration of Starlink satellite internet on Ryanair's aircraft. According to NS3.AI, Musk contends that the fuel drag resulting from Starlink installation is negligible. In contrast, O’Leary emphasizes the high costs and limited interest among budget airline passengers as significant obstacles. The dispute has also led to humorous speculation about a potential takeover, though legal ownership restrictions and economic challenges present significant hurdles to Musk acquiring Ryanair.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints Additional 250 Million Tokens
data.description: The USDC Treasury has minted an additional 250 million USDC tokens, as reported by Whale Alert. According to NS3.AI, this significant minting event increases the circulating supply of the stablecoin. The move may indicate rising demand or serve as preparatory liquidity for market activities involving USDC.

data.title: Stellar's Market Challenges Amid Bearish Sentiment
data.description:
Stellar (XLM) is experiencing ongoing downward pressure as the broader cryptocurrency market remains weak. According to NS3.AI, 68% of traders are holding short positions, highlighting a strong bearish sentiment. Despite this, on-chain analysis reveals increasing capital inflows, indicated by a bullish divergence in the Chaikin Money Flow indicator, suggesting that investors might be accumulating XLM.

The cryptocurrency needs to maintain support around $0.210 to prevent further decline towards $0.188. If buying momentum increases, there is potential for a rebound to $0.230.

data.title: Crypto Boom Ahead? Pantera Capital Pinpoints Major Catalysts For 2026 Success
data.description:
On Wednesday, Pantera Capital, one of the largest venture capital firms in the crypto industry, released its latest blockchain letter. In this edition, the firm reflects on the challenges faced in 2025 while projecting optimism for the remaining months of 2026. Pantera Capital Identifies Growth Catalysts Pantera begins by acknowledging that last year was not fundamentally driven when it came to returns within the crypto markets. It cites macroeconomic factors, market positioning, and structural influences as the main drivers that shaped performance, particularly for assets beyond Bitcoin (BTC)
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/crypto-boom-ahead-pantera-capital-pinpoints-major-catalysts-for-2026-success/

data.title: Jeff Bezos’ Blue Origin launches TeraWave, a 6 Tbps satellite broadband network to take on Starlink
data.description:
Jeff Bezos just dropped another satellite bomb. Blue Origin is launching TeraWave, a broadband network built with 5,408 satellites to compete directly with Elon Musk’s Starlink and Bezos’ old empire, Amazon. The new system is aimed at governments, data centers, and enterprise clients, not everyday folks. Blue Origin says it’ll offer up to 6 terabits […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jeff-bezos-blue-origin-launches-terawave/

data.title: F/m Investments Seeks SEC Approval for Tokenized ETF Shares
data.description: F/m Investments has applied for approval from the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to tokenize shares of its U.S. Treasury 3-Month Bill ETF. According to NS3.AI, the initiative aims to record ownership on a permissioned blockchain while maintaining all rights and economic features of traditional shares. The proposal highlights the importance of regulatory oversight, transparency, custody, and auditing to ensure compliance with the Investment Company Act of 1940 and align with existing financial standards.

data.title: Strive Aims to Raise $150 Million for Bitcoin Acquisition and Debt Reduction
data.description: Strive is planning to raise up to $150 million through a follow-on offering of its preferred SATA stock. According to NS3.AI, the company intends to use the proceeds to purchase more Bitcoin and retire convertible senior notes. The funds will also be directed towards reducing debt from Semler Scientific and supporting corporate needs. Strive plans to strategically manage dividend rates on SATA stock to maintain its price within target trading ranges.

data.title: Venezuelan Oil Exports to U.S. Rise Amid Supply Deal
data.description: Venezuelan oil exports to the United States have surged to approximately 7.8 million barrels as part of a $2 billion supply agreement. According to NS3.AI, this development has contributed to a slight increase in the stock prices of Exxon Mobil and Chevron. The U.S. government has granted Chevron an expanded license to boost production in Venezuela, although production cuts by PDVSA persist. Despite the ongoing issue of tanker seizures, industry experts anticipate that the oil sector, particularly U.S. oil stocks, will demonstrate resilience in 2026 due to geopolitical changes.

data.title: Decentralized social media protocol Farcaster sold post-billion dollar valuation
data.description:
Farcaster, a decentralized social media protocol built on Ethereum and Optimism has been acquired by Neynar, a developer tools company linked to the Web3 space, following its peak valuation of around $1 billion. The move comes after Farcaster raised around $180 million in total funding across rounds, including a major $150 million Series A in […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/farcaster-sold-billion-dollar-valuation/
